reason: Final check against global RVV-first authority and Stage2 scope.
Verify dequant-clamp Gearbox handoff, provider-owned route facts, and no legacy authority drift.
Verify Common EmitC remains neutral and consumes provider payload only.
Verify generated-bundle and ssh rvv correctness evidence is sufficient and not overclaimed.
Verify real hardware evidence wording and limits.
Verify selected-body realization/resource facts are preserved through route and artifact evidence.
Check capability and runtime facts remain constraints rather than route authority.
Check RVV-specific logic remains local to RVV plugin/target support.
Check no descriptor/direct-C/high-level compute route was introduced.
Task-specific requirements, acceptance criteria, and out-of-scope boundaries.
